ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the product sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of units sold in the transaction */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the sale */,
  "total" REAL /* Total amount of the sale including tax */,
  "cogs" REAL /* Cost of goods sold for the transaction */,
  "gross_income" REAL /* Gross income generated from the sale */,
  "rating" REAL /* Customer rating for the product sold */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product sold */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order associated with the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Store where the sale was made (for in-store purchases) */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the sale was made (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category to which the product belongs */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Cost of the product to the retailer */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for inventory management */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sale transaction associated with the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was delivered */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order including discounts and shipping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address where the order is to be shipped */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for shipping (e.g., UPS, FedEx) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related order */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the order */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount of any refund */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date of any refund */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
